item.title: Catching share price re-ratings early with Ed Croft, CEO of Stockopedia
item.summary: The UK Investor Magazine was delighted to welcome Ed Croft, CEO of Stockopedia, back to the podcast to delve into Stockopedia’s rules-based investing indicators and how investors can gain an edge on share price re-ratings. In this episode, he discusses new research into a pattern he had traded on instinct for years: what happens when […] The post Catching share price re-ratings early with Ed Croft, CEO of Stockopedia appeared first on UK Investor Magazine .
